mapper.sql: id, wm_order_id, wm_order_type, task_type, flag, retry_num, msg, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, priority, delflag, change_flag, sent_success_time
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_wm_order_task
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_wm_order_task (id, wm_order_id, wm_order_type, task_type, flag, retry_num, msg, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, priority, delflag, change_flag, sent_success_time ) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{wmOrderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{wmOrderType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taskType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{flag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{retryNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{msg,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{priority,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{changeFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sentSuccessTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )

insert into dbo.ops_wm_order_task
id,
wm_order_id,
wm_order_type,
task_type,
flag,
retry_num,
msg,
cre_time,
creator,
modify_time,
modifier,
priority,
delflag,
change_flag,
sent_success_time,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{wmOrderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{wmOrderType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{taskType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{flag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{retryNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{msg,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
#{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

#{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{changeFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{sentSuccessTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update dbo.ops_wm_order_task
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
wm_order_id = #{record.wmOrderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
wm_order_type = #{record.wmOrderType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
task_type = #{record.taskType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
flag = #{record.flag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
retry_num = #{record.retryNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
msg = #{record.msg,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
priority = #{record.priority,jdbcType=INTEGER},
delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
change_flag = #{record.changeFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
sent_success_time = #{record.sentSuccessTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

update dbo.ops_wm_order_task set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, wm_order_id = #{record.wmOrderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, wm_order_type = #{record.wmOrderType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, task_type = #{record.taskType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, flag = #{record.flag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, retry_num = #{record.retryNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, msg = #{record.msg,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, priority = #{record.priority,jdbcType=INTEGER}, delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, change_flag = #{record.changeFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sent_success_time = #{record.sentSuccessTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

update dbo.ops_wm_order_task
wm_order_id = #{wmOrderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
wm_order_type = #{wmOrderType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
task_type = #{taskType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
flag = #{flag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
retry_num = #{retryNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
msg = #{msg,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
priority = #{priority,jdbcType=INTEGER},
delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
change_flag = #{changeFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
sent_success_time = #{sentSuccessTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.ops_wm_order_task set wm_order_id = #{wmOrderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, wm_order_type = #{wmOrderType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, task_type = #{taskType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, flag = #{flag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, retry_num = #{retryNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, msg = #{msg,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, priority = #{priority,jdbcType=INTEGER}, delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, change_flag = #{changeFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sent_success_time = #{sentSuccessTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
